definition: Reasoning = navigation of stable relational geometry

evaluation_contract.claim_boundary: reasoning-path evidence may support traversal analysis; it does not prove general intelligence
evaluation_contract.control_rule: random, shuffled, no-memory, and pairwise paths must not explain the same behavior
evaluation_contract.counterfactual_rule: removing high-Phi/high-stability edges should harm task behavior
evaluation_contract.path_source: stable real D_causal paths from the complete architecture
evaluation_contract.positive_evidence: real geometry paths are more stable and explanatory than controls
